title: Document superrepo submodule and centralized Open VSX CI

source.subject: docs: document superrepo submodule and centralized Open VS X CI

body:
## Outcome

Document superrepo submodule and centralized Open VS X CI.

## Context

- Workstream **editor-extension** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid_vscode`
